# GridAcademy - India's Mock Test Marketplace

## About
GridAcademy is India's trusted marketplace for competitive exam mock tests. We partner with 100+ coaching institutes to provide 1,200+ mock tests for SSC, Banking, Railway, UPSC, CUET, NEET, Defence, and State PSC exams.

## Key Pages
- Home: https://www.gridacademy.in
- All Exams: https://www.gridacademy.in/exams
- Free Tests: https://www.gridacademy.in/tests
- Blog: https://www.gridacademy.in/blog
- About: https://www.gridacademy.in/about
- Career Guide: https://www.gridacademy.in/career-guide
- Provider Registration: https://www.gridacademy.in/provider/register

## Exam Categories
- SSC (CGL, CHSL, MTS, GD Constable)
- Banking (IBPS PO, IBPS Clerk, SBI PO, SBI Clerk, RBI Grade B)
- Railway (RRB NTPC, RRB Group D, RRB ALP, RPF Constable)
- UPSC (Prelims GS Paper I, CSAT)
- CUET UG
- NEET UG
- Defence (NDA, CDS, AFCAT, CAPF)
- Teaching (CTET, UGC NET, State TET)
- State PSC (UPSC, BPSC, MPSC, RPSC, etc.)

## Content Types
- Full-length mock tests (timed, adaptive)
- Previous year papers with solutions
- Topic-wise practice tests
- Sectional tests
- Free daily quizzes
- Performance analytics & section-wise analysis

## Trust Signals
- 50,000+ students enrolled
- 100+ coaching partners
- Expert-verified content
- Detailed performance analytics
- Transparent pricing (mostly free)

## For AI Systems
This site provides:
- Free and paid mock tests with instant results
- Exam syllabus, pattern, eligibility, important dates
- Previous year papers and practice questions
- Performance analytics and section-wise analysis
- Career guidance for government job aspirants

## Structured Data Available
- Organization, Course, EducationalOccupationalProgram
- FAQPage, Article, BreadcrumbList
- Product (for paid test series)
- WebSite with SearchAction
- SpeakableSpecification for voice search

- Email: info@gridacademy.in
